pi_items.source: Verified via task.json description ("Create a new Call Time definition: Call Time ID: PRISUP_HRS") and setup_task.sh which ensures this ID is clear before the task starts.
Verified via setup_task.sh which inserts group_id "PRISUP" into vicidial_inbound_groups.
Verified via task.json description specifying "Schedule: Monday-Friday 09:00 to 18:00".
Verified via task.json description specifying "Schedule: Monday-Friday 09:00 to 18:00".
Verified via task.json description specifying "Set the After Hours Action to VOICEMAIL".
Verified via setup_task.sh which inserts voicemail_id "1000" and task.json description instructing to set the box to "1000".
Verified via setup_task.sh which sets the initial after_hours_message to "vm-goodbye" and task.json description confirming this value.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated configuration data within a Vicidial database, injected via setup_task.sh. The expected target group is "PRISUP", which is created by the setup script. The target call time ID is "PRISUP_HRS" with an expected M-F start time of 0900 and stop time of 1800. The expected after-hours routing action is "VOICEMAIL" directed to voicemail box "1000", with the after-hours message set to "vm-goodbye".
